StyledText.Data: This is the name of the theme as it appears in the CMT when creating a new Title. It doesn’t need to be unique.
A theme does normally belong to a specific client. However, when creating a Title any theme can be selected.
This is the theme identifier that will be exported in the Package JSON. A theme with this name must be included in the template styles otherwise it will default to theme = Base project One.
The colors of the striped horizontal divider line. Viable colors: black,white,primary,secondary,fail,success etc... and hex color. Should be written comma-separated i.e. “black,primary”
This is the client logo that will brand the training. The logo in this field is only used for scrolling productions and should be Width = X px and Height = Y px. SVG is recommended, otherwise PNG.
This is the client logo that will brand the training. The logo in this field is only used for slide productions and should be Width = X px and Height = Y px. SVG is recommended, otherwise PNG.
